title: Rewrite FLEET §4 as an honest by-claim ledger — split code-runs from gate-passed
rationale: By-claim finding: FLEET §4's status column marks #6/#8/#10/#11 with a single 'IMPLEMENTED'-shaped token, conflating two different assertions — that a mechanism *runs* versus that a harness *passed a gate it did not choose*. Two rows read as done and are stubs at the map's own layer: (a) #11 universe-builder is labelled 'IMPLEMENTED here', yet frontier.json says best.leverId=null and best.metric==baseline — no Gap has ever drawn, so the validated *result* is OPEN, not implemented; (b) #10 spellweb is 'READY', but §5 states plainly 'What it lacks is the Gap' — the audit triad is PROVEN/IMPLEMENTED (I confirmed graph-coherence-audit.mjs exists) while the *harness* is OPEN/SPEC. The rewrite makes every one of the twelve rows carry pathway/tier/status/trace inline (the current table carries none of the four per claim, only a lone status word — so as written §4 fails the hard constraint), splits the two rows whose mechanism-tier and harness-tier genuinely differ, and preserves every load-bearing fact (all 12 names, the factor each defends, vertex/home, gate, the 9,024-witness figure, the C82 moving-ceiling warrant which I verified at CONJECTURE_REGISTER_V6.md line 152, and the diversity-covers-factors thesis). It reinforces K-3 (row 8: mana is regime-1, not proof) rather than re-proposing it, and assigns no seat by wing (K-1 respected).
hardConstraintNote: Every claim carries all four labels visibly inline as a slash-joined token plus a resolving trace. pathway ∈ {protect(#6 custody),project(#8 outward spend),reflect(#1-4,10,11,12 prove/measure/witness),connect(#5,7,9 bilateral/federation)}. tier ∈ {PROVEN (#2 read directly from tigzkp-mage.json; #10 audit exits 0), REPORTED (#1,3,4,6,8,9,11-config — sourced to each instance's own frontier/path), OPEN (#5,7,10-harness,11-result,12 — each states its falsifier/blocker)}; no DERIVED or MYTH used, so no MYTH-in-method-doc violation is possible. status ∈ {IMPLEMENTED, SPEC} only, never LORE. Traces resolve to concrete paths (tigzkp_mage/canon/tigzkp-mage.json, spellweb/scripts/graph-coherence-audit.mjs, research/CONJECTURE_REGISTER_V6.md line 152, tig_zk_loop/privacy_pools_v2_mage, universe/frontier.json best.leverId) or to in-map sections (§1,§5,§6,§7). Rows 10 and 11 carry TWO labelled sub-claims each precisely because mechanism-tier ≠ harness-tier — that split is the lever. No number is restated from memory; 9,024 and C82/line-152 are the only figures and both are cited, not asserted (GR-1). Word count 352 by the frontier counting rule (tr -s whitespace | grep -c .), below the current §4's 394, so the lever lowers the metric while converting a hard-constraint-failing section into a compliant one.
killedLeverCitations: K-1 (wing→seat) — respected: the ledger assigns no seat by alignment
K-3 (mana as attestation) — respected and reinforced in row 8 (regime-1, no gate); not re-proposed
mapText:
## 4 · The fleet ledger — by factor, at honest tier

`V(π,t)` is a product; any zero collapses it (T5). Read each harness by the
factor it defends, not its topic. Every row carries pathway/tier/status/trace;
the seam this ledger keeps honest is *code-runs* (IMPLEMENTED) versus
*gate-passed* (a higher tier) — several rows split on exactly that.

1. **shor_mage** — defends R(d) reconstruction-cost; Horizon-V35; gate
   9,024-hashed-witnesses. reflect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED, trace=shor_mage-frontier.
2. **tigzkp_mage** — R(d)+witness-computability; V38⊥V25; gate
   held-out-equivalence-points. reflect/PROVEN/IMPLEMENTED,
   trace=tigzkp_mage/canon/tigzkp-mage.json (read-directly).
3. **V6-pipeline** — A_h(τ) fidelity-over-time; papers-no-vertex; gate
   P0–P3+adversarial-reviewer. reflect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED,
   trace=agentprivacy-docs-pipeline.
4. **privacy_pools_v2** — R(d)-on-live-target; V38⊥V25; gate
   as-#2+certificates. reflect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED,
   trace=tig_zk_loop/privacy_pools_v2_mage (dir-confirmed).
5. **MyTerms·Reclaim** — Φ_agent(Σ),T4; /covenant-V55⊥V8; gate bilateral-record.
   connect/OPEN/SPEC (loop-mock-only), trace=§1.
6. **Hearthold·Hold** — P,A_h(τ); /vault-V57⊥V6; gate factor-2-step-up-ladder.
   Implemented *upstream*, not as a gated harness here — a name true at one
   layer, absent at another. protect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED-upstream,
   trace=Hearthold-repo.
7. **the-rite·Prove** — C credential-verifiability; /hall-V15⊥V48; gate
   trust-task+co-signature. Blocked on the First Person's key decision.
   connect/OPEN/SPEC-blocked, trace=§7.
8. **the-city·Spend** — T_∫(π) edge-value; /etherchanting-V51; *no gate: mana
   is not proof* (§6). Code runs, claims nothing — regime-1.
   project/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED-regime-1, trace=§6-City-Key-loop.
9. **fedwiki·Observe** — e^{−λt} freshness; the-guide; gate
   integrity-check+human. connect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED, trace=the-guide.
10. **spellweb-coherence** — the substrate itself; /holon-V31⊥V32. Two claims,
    not one. The **audit-triad** (graph-coherence, template-drift, interop)
    runs and exits 0: reflect/PROVEN/IMPLEMENTED,
    trace=spellweb/scripts/graph-coherence-audit.mjs. The **harness** does not
    yet exist — *it lacks the Gap* (§5): reflect/OPEN/SPEC, trace=§5. "READY"
    names the second, not the first.
11. **universe-builder** — the map; this directory; gate
    held-out-corpus-comprehension. Same split: the config exists
    (reflect/REPORTED/IMPLEMENTED, trace=README-files-table) but **no round has
    passed** — frontier.best.metric
    equals baseline, best.leverId=null, no Gap has drawn — so the *validated
    result* is reflect/OPEN/SPEC, trace=harness.config.mjs+frontier.json. It
    reads done; it is unproven.
12. **shelf-life-harness** — R(t) the-moving-ceiling; unclaimed-vertex; gate
    re-run-yesterday's-guarantees-vs-today's-capability. Unbuilt. Warrant is
    **C82** — frontier capability raises C_S(t)+C_M(t) against a fixed archive
    without raising H(X), so every static guarantee has finite shelf-life t* —
    the instance the model demands and nobody built.
    reflect/OPEN/SPEC-PROPOSED, trace=C82,CONJECTURE_REGISTER_V6.md-line-152.

Of twelve, only #1–#4 defend a factor with an IMPLEMENTED-and-gated instance;
the rest are SPEC, blocked, regime-1, implemented-elsewhere, or unbuilt.
Marking any a plain "IMPLEMENTED result" sets a factor to zero (T5) and hides
it until the product collapses.
